form.formComment: Most recently sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 12 at this track Bm66 on March 29 over 1100m, neck behind Concoction with 58.5kg at $31. The start before that 5th of 9 at Moree Bm58 on March 17 over 950m, 1.75 len behind Prucia with 61.5kg at $4.80. Rates highly and will be hard to stop.

form.formComment: Last start was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by a nose at Muswellbrook Cg&E Cl1 April 6 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Arapawa carrying 55kg at $51. The race before that eased back early on 6th of 10 at this track Ctry Cl1 on March 13 over 1400m, slow going 4 len behind Maggie Sparkles with 53.5kg at $21. Confidence back and another bold showing is expected.
